issues.message: English has 'the kid' but Greek lacks ὁ παῖς / ὁ μικρός — intentional?
few Koine/classical neighbours (1/5) — register may be drifting. Target is Koine structure with Attic vocabulary.

lexical_suggestions.query: Already gunfire was general within the tent and a dozen exits had been hacked through the canvas walls and people were pouring out, women screaming, folk stumbling, folk trampled underfoot in the mud
lexical_suggestions.greek: μετὰ τοῦτο σφάξει ὁ ἱερεὺς τὸ ὁλοκαύτωμα.

As they did so the tent began to sway and buckle and like a huge and wounded medusa it slowly settled to the ground trailing tattered canvas walls and ratty guyropes over the ground

lexical_suggestions.greek: ἔδωκεν τὸ ποτήριον εἰς τὴν χεῖρα Φαραώ.
